---
title: "Guozheng"
listing:
  - id: posts-en
    contents: "**/*/index.qmd"
    type: default
    fields: [image, date, title, subtitle, author, reading-time, description]  
    sort: "date desc"
    categories: cloud
    sort-ui: true
    filter-ui: true
    page-size: 10
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
comments: false
---

## English Posts

::: {#posts-en}
:::
